revenue_recognition.method: IP license — series of distinct services transferred over time
revenue_recognition.variable_consideration: Franchise royalty fees are sales-based royalties recognized as hotel room sales occur
revenue_recognition.fixed_consideration: Application/initiation fees allocated based on standalone selling prices, recognized over contract term
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized in period received — no further service obligation and collection uncertainty
revenue_recognition.incentive_payments: Contract acquisition costs amortized over contract term (including extension periods at franchisor's sole option) as reduction to franchise royalty fees

accounts_receivable.description: Amounts due from hotel owners under franchise contracts
accounts_receivable.allowance_methodology: Based on historical collection activity, nature of instrument, current and forecasted business conditions

financing_receivables.description: Loans made to certain franchised hotel owners

franchise_contracts.description: Capitalized consideration paid to incentivize hotel owners + incremental costs to obtain contracts
franchise_contracts.amortization_method: Straight-line over contract term (generally 10-20 years including extension periods at franchisor's sole option)
franchise_contracts.amortization_start: Opening date of hotel or contract execution date, whichever is later
franchise_contracts.impairment_testing: Evaluate for indicators; if indicators exist, compare expected undiscounted future cash flows to carrying value

franchise_deposits.description: Application/initiation fees collected at application time, recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenue

deferred_revenues.description: Non-refundable advance consideration recognized over contract term

fair_value.assessment: Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated equal to carrying values as of December 31, 2024 and 2023

income_taxes.us_treatment: Disregarded entity for US income tax — all taxable income included in Hilton parent computation
income_taxes.foreign_taxes: Certain US territories withhold taxes on franchise licensing fees to foreign-domiciled entities (includes US entities in some jurisdictions)

acquisition_note.description: Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired May 2024 as part of larger Hilton acquisition

commitments_and_contingencies.debt_guarantee: Certain Hilton debt obligations (maturing 2025-2033) unconditionally and irrevocably guaranteed by certain direct/indirect wholly owned domestic subsidiaries including this entity
commitments_and_contingencies.collateral_pledge: All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for the term of the debt agreements
commitments_and_contingencies.litigation: Various claims and lawsuits in ordinary course; ultimate resolution not expected to have material adverse effect

related_party_transactions.centralized_cash_management: Intercompany balances with Hilton affiliates through centralized system not controlled by entity
related_party_transactions.lockbox_arrangement: Franchise deposits collected by Hilton affiliates into lockbox account to which entity has no access
related_party_transactions.settlements_2024: $1,500,000,000 (receivable settlement) with simultaneous $1,500,000,000 distribution to parent
related_party_transactions.graduate_acquisition_financing: Payment made by affiliate; entity recorded short-term note payable, settled February 2024 with accrued interest
related_party_transactions.operator_agreement: Agreement with Hilton affiliate entitled to reasonable compensation; no compensation provided in 2022-2024

subsequent_events.evaluation_date: March 18, 2024 (NOTE: likely typographical error for March 18, 2025)

notes_not_present: Depreciation/amortization of physical assets (entity holds no physical assets)
Advertising fund separate accounting (no separate fund exists)
